ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's job type */,
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's marital status */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's education level */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has a credit in default (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "balance" INTEGER /* Customer's current bank balance */,
  "housing_loan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has a housing loan (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "personal_loan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has a personal loan (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "campaign_response" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer responded positively to a marketing campaign (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer resides */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the customer */,
  "loyalty_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the customer's loyalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_marital_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_id") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "target_audience_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign interaction */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Customer's response to the interaction (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction was last updated */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_details_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_details_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "loan_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate of the loan */,
  "term_years" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan product */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the loan product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the loan product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the loan product was last updated */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_products_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "repayment_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan repayment (e.g., current, overdue, paid off) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the loan record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the loan record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the loan record was last updated */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled payment */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments made by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id", "customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance after the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction record was last updated */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
